title: Australia's teen social media ban fails to clear first hurdle in age checks, says study
summary: Since December, Australia's new social media law has mandated that platforms including Instagram, Snapchat and YouTube bar people under 16 years from having accounts. Operators must take "reasonable steps" to comply, and the government has recommended using multiple checks to determine users' age.

title: Xbox layoffs: CEO Asha Sharma deems historic job cuts a ‘reset’, not a decline
summary: Xbox will eliminate roughly 3,200 roles over FY27, with about 1,600 cuts effective immediately. Four studios — Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, Ninja Theory, and Undead Labs — will exit Xbox under new ownership.
